inputs.text: A high-quality, realistic lifestyle photography of a beautiful young Asian woman with long dark wavy hair and light brown highlights, smiling charmingly with visible dimples on her cheek. She is wearing a white lightweight linen button-up shirt over a grey tank top and a light blue mini skirt. She is holding a wooden spoon filled with bright blue shaved ice towards the camera in a close-up POV shot, and holding a small brown paper cup of the same blue shaved ice in her other hand. The background is a trendy dessert shop with light blue and turquoise mosaic tile walls and a wooden counter. Bright, natural summer sunlight, refreshing and cool atmosphere, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, highly detailed skin texture.
